name: standards closed-loop validation fails with a clear error when the promote step is broken
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-source test-std --simulate-failure promote 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'failed_step=promote' err.txt && grep -q 'pipeline_broken' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
